title: albizia carrii
intro: Albizia carrii, also known as the Candelabra Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Albizia carrii include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
